title: Operations Manager
description: Oversee daily logistics operations and last-mile delivery fleet in Jabodetabek.
requirements: - 4+ years operations management\n- Experience in logistics or supply chain\n- Strong leadership and problem-solving skills

title: Fleet Coordinator
description: Coordinate driver schedules and vehicle maintenance across the fleet.
requirements: - 2+ years fleet or transport coordination\n- Proficient in Google Sheets or similar tools\n- Good communication skills

title: Backend Engineer
description: Build APIs and internal tools to support logistics operations and tracking.
requirements: - 3+ years backend development\n- Experience with Go or Node.js\n- Familiarity with real-time systems a plus

title: Customer Service Lead
description: Handle merchant and end-customer inquiries and escalations.
requirements: - 2+ years customer service experience\n- Experience in logistics or e-commerce preferred\n- Patient and solution-oriented
